note: These toggle points belong to OPTIONAL subsystems that are parameter-disabled (tied off) in the default RV32IMC SKU-1, so they are structurally unreachable without changing the configuration. Coverage for them is measured separately in their own optional-config runs (RV32A=1 / PMP_ENTRIES=8 / debug-active), NOT in the default-SKU acceptance number. Removing them from the default-SKU toggle denominator is a justified §04 exclusion, not a coverage hole.

waivers.reason: PMP_ENTRIES=0 in the default SKU (ADR-0024). The PMP region/match/fault datapath is tied off; its bits cannot toggle without PMP_ENTRIES>0. Verified separately in phase_07_10_pmp_directed with PMP_ENTRIES=8.

Debug trigger module (ADR-0022) is not active in the default-SKU functional farm run (no debugger attached). Trigger match/hit datapath only toggles under debug-active stimulus. Verified separately in phase_06_02_debug_trigger.

PMP configuration/address CSRs (pmpcfg0-3, pmpaddr0-N) read/write datapath inside u_csr is tied off when PMP_ENTRIES=0 (default SKU). Toggles only with PMP_ENTRIES>0. Verified separately in phase_07_10_pmp_directed.

Debug-mode CSRs (dcsr, dpc, dscratch0/1) inside u_csr only toggle when the core enters debug mode (debugger attached). Not exercised in the default-SKU functional farm. Verified separately in phase_06_* debug runs.

totals.remaining_to_close: in-SKU remaining ~5650 bits: u_ras 624 (directed call/return), u_csr M-CSR/TRAP storage ~571 (directed walking CSR writes + trap variety), u_csr other 495, ifu/bp/idu/cdec/rfu corner top-ups. Est ~1 day directed.
